title: Stiltz Lifts and Other Lifts
metaTitle: Stiltz Lifts and Other Lifts - Aging in Place Remodeling
metaDescription: Stiltz lifts, stair lifts, vertical platform lifts and pool lifts for home accessibility. AIPR is the #1 US Stiltz dealer.
intro: One of the biggest challenges we face is how to maintain or regain access to the second floor of their home. Since many of our older home designs put the bedrooms upstairs, safe access to the stairs is important.

subServices.name: Stiltz Lifts
subServices.description: Stiltz home elevators provide access to all areas of your home. AIPR is the #1 US Stiltz dealer.

subServices.name: Stair Lifts
subServices.description: Stairlifts are a great way to quickly regain your freedom. These units can typically be installed in one day.

subServices.name: Vertical Platform Lifts
subServices.description: Vertical platform lifts provide solutions for front or back entrance steps that create accessibility challenges.

subServices.name: Pool Lifts
subServices.description: ADA-compliant pool lift designs for pools and spas, ensuring safe water access.
